localised_text.tooltip_text: [[col:red]]You've already accepted another mission. If you wish to accept this one instead, complete or decline the other one.[[/col]]

alert_icon.componentleveltooltip: You can attain new Insignias for these units!
New missions have been issued by Zhao Ming

localised_text.tooltip_text: Decline Mission||A new Mission will be issued next turn.
Increase Unit Capacity||Permanently increase your faction's maximum capacity for the unit(s) by [[col:green]]+1[[/col]].

Warriors of Shang-Yang who march beside the Tiger Warriors gradually adopt their predatory discipline, learning to strike swiftly and hone their instincts, once thought exclusive to the White Tiger’s mercenary host. Through shared battle, even traditional Cathayan formations unlock new abilities that mirror the Tigers’ legendary speed, precision, and ferocity.
Select and undertake a variety of important missions for Zhao Ming. Gaining Iron Favour and other rewards from the Iron Dragon

template_target_name.componentleveltooltip: Left-click to zoom to target location.

turns_until_reroll_holder.componentleveltooltip: Turns until this mission is refreshed if not accepted by then

component_text.text: Bound by oath to the Iron Dragon Zhao Ming, Bhashiva, Lord of Shang‑Yang, is tasked with enacting the Dragon’s will. Fulfilling these mandates grants Iron Favour, which can be spent within the Armies of Shang‑Yang to strengthen Bhashiva’s forces and unlock rewards bestowed by the Master of the Iron Winds.
